title: Empowering New Users with Smart Alerts

topics.title: User Guidance Enhancements
topics.summary: New console messages have been implemented to assist users, particularly newcomers, by providing project information and warnings about code execution risks. This initiative aims to improve user awareness and safety while using the platform.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Recent pull requests have focused on enhancing the user interface of npmx. Notable changes include fixing spacing issues in BlueSky post embeds and adding a changelog shortcut to the keyboard shortcuts menu, improving overall user experience and accessibility.

topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: The project has made strides in internationalization by updating Japanese translations. This ensures that non-English speaking users have access to the same features and information, promoting inclusivity within the npmx community.
